content: Run cargo fmt --check before cutting any release tag; CI rejects unformatted code.
Run cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings before pushing; pedantic + nursery lints are gating.
Forbidden deps: tokio, rusqlite, petgraph, hyper, axum, tower, reqwest, sqlx, diesel, sea-orm — CI greps for them.
Integration tests must hit a real FrankenSQLite DB; mocking the storage layer hides migration drift.
All work lands on main. No worktrees. No feature branches. No interactive rebase.
ee's core jobs are Ingest, Retrieve, Pack, Learn, Maintain — anything outside this set is scope creep.
FrankenSQLite via sqlmodel is source of truth; Frankensearch indexes are derived/rebuildable assets.
Asupersync is the only runtime — Cx/Scope/Outcome — no Tokio anywhere in the dep tree.
2026-04-22: cut v0.1.0 as walking skeleton; init+remember+search+context+why+status only.
Defer CASS import MVP to v0.2.0; ee-cass should consume robot/JSON and never duplicate the store.
Golden tests broke when timestamps weren't scrubbed; always canonicalize RFC 3339 fields in fixtures.
2026-04-30: release workflow tried to push with --no-verify; hook failed silently. Never skip hooks.
Cancellation test for ee context hung once because Scope::spawn didn't propagate the cancel token; fixed via budget.
JSON output goes to stdout; human diagnostics go to stderr. Long-running commands use stderr-only progress on TTY.
Context packs must never include secrets. Redaction is enforced at the policy layer, not at output time.
